title: SiTime Q3 2023 Earnings Preview - Inventory Reduction Complete
text: SiTime (NASDAQ:SITM) was scheduled to announce Q3 earnings results on Wednesday, November 1st, after market close. The consensus EPS Estimate was -$0.00 and the consensus Revenue Estimate was $34.63M (-52.6% Y/Y). Q3 2023 was in line with guidance, with revenue for the quarter of $35.5 million, non-GAAP gross margins of 58.2%, and non-GAAP EPS of $0.06 per share versus a loss of $0.21 in Q2 2023. The company continued to see a reduction of inventory in Q3 and an uptick in end demand, particularly in the mobile IoT consumer segment. For Q4 2023 guidance, the company expected non-GAAP EPS to be somewhere between $0.18 and $0.22 per share.
